result: {"schema_version": 1, "pass": false, "review_status": "completed", "summary": "從 os.popen 遷移到 subprocess，但 command injection 漏洞原封不動地保留下來", "issues": [{"severity": "critical", "confidence": "high", "category": "security", "file": "core/handler.py", "line_hint": "L5", "check": "user_input 直接以 f-string 嵌入 shell 命令，搭配 shell=True 傳給 subprocess.check_output", "verdict": "經典 command injection — 攻擊者輸入 `; rm -rf /` 即可執行任意指令。遷移到 subprocess 沒有修掉原本 os.popen 就存在的漏洞", "fix": "移除 shell=True，改用 list 傳參：subprocess.check_output(['echo', user_input]).decode()；或根據實際用途重新評估是否需要呼叫外部指令"}, {"severity": "major", "confidence": "medium", "category": "correctness", "file": "core/handler.py", "line_hint": "L5", "check": "subprocess.check_output 在指令回傳非零 exit code 時會拋出 CalledProcessError", "verdict": "舊版 os.popen 不會拋例外，新版會。若呼叫端未 catch CalledProcessError，非零回傳將導致未處理例外", "fix": "視需求加 try/except CalledProcessError，或改用 subprocess.run(capture_output=True) 手動檢查 returncode"}]}
